entry.title: New: CR 25-86 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 160, CD1 (2025), to authorize the Mayor to enter into an intergovernmental agreement with various governmental entities on O‘ahu, Kaua‘i, and Hawai‘i Islands for the Wai Maoli: Fresh Water Initiative.

Water and Infrastructure Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
